name: Demo Flight
location_str: Tianlong-3 Launch Pad @ Jiuquan Satellite Launch Center, CHN
description: First test launch of Space Pioneer’s Tianlong-3 rocket. Reports indicate this launch may carry a batch of satellites for the SpaceSail/G60/Qianfan LEO communication satellites constellation.
rocket_fact: Hypergolic fuels ignite spontaneously upon contact with each other, making them reliable for restarting engines in space.
